name: Loupedeck
description: Custom console/stream deck configuration software (now under Logitech)

download.note: Directory uses {MAJOR}.{MINOR} (e.g. 6.3), filename uses full 4-segment build (e.g. 6.3.0.340). Best to extract actual href from the downloads page.

changelog.note: Release notes embedded in the downloads page content — no separate changelog URL

release_date.note: Last-Modified header on downloads page is best proxy — no explicit dates on page

notes: Acquired by Logitech in 2023. End-of-sales announced, but software still available. Hosted on HubSpot (support.loupedeck.com). Clean HTML, no Cloudflare. Two version formats: display (6.3.0) and full build (6.3.0.340). Supports CT, Live, Live S, Loupedeck+, Razer Stream Controller.
